contract_summary: This function releases all ordered extents stored in ctx->ordered_extents by calling btrfs_put_ordered_extent on each one, after removing them from the list. It must be called with the inode lock held (btrfs_assert_inode_locked). After this call, the ordered_extents list is empty and the caller must not use any of the freed ordered extents. This is a cleanup/release helper typically invoked when tearing down a log context or after processing all pending ordered extents.
